'''''Pure Sabacc''''' was a [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] in private service.

The corvette was used as a transport vessel by its captain, [[Vortia Kwis]]. Kwis agreed to ferry refugees from [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] shortly after the [[Battle of Dubrillion]]. After fighting their way out of a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] sneak attack at Dantooine, Kwis lost faith in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and joined the [[Peace Brigade]], adapting ''Pure Sabacc'' into a traveling recruitment center.
